title: CronAgents Global Configuration
description: Schema for the cronagents.json global scheduler configuration file.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema file.

autoFeedback.description: Auto-trigger feedback evaluator after each run.

maxRunHistory.description: Max run directories to keep. 0 = unlimited.

copilotPath.description: Path to the Copilot CLI binary.

retentionDays.description: Delete run directories older than this many days. 0 = never delete.

logLevel.description: Minimum log level for scheduler output.

start.description: Start of quiet hours in HH:MM format.

end.description: End of quiet hours in HH:MM format.

quietHours.description: Time window during which no agents are run. Null to disable.

syncPolicy.description: How the scheduler handles git sync after agent runs.

userName.description: Git user name override. Null = detect from git config.

branchPrefix.description: Prefix for branches created by versioning.

versioning.description: Git versioning settings for agent runs.
